_comment: IDs marked here become `project: true` in parameter-definitions.json. Pure documentation hint — used by the project-settings doc generator. Keep the list to global / cluster-level settings (DNS, mirrors, registry credentials, …). The flag does NOT change runtime behavior.

alpine_mirror.reason: Alpine APK mirror; einmal global gesetzt.

debian_mirror.reason: Debian APT mirror; einmal global gesetzt.

searchdomain.reason: DNS-Search-Domain für alle Container des Projekts.

oidc_issuer_url.reason: Zentraler Zitadel-Issuer für das ganze Projekt.
